prompt: Write segment 9 (THE ASK, Day 18) of the openpatent.ai 10-segment cold-outreach sequence, tuned for the **gov_defense** persona — a federal program office, defense prime IP team, or tech-transfer office. The email must (a) be ≤150 words in the body (excluding signature footer), (b) explicitly name all 6 layers of the disclosure (title, description, drawings, prototype reference, contributor hash, chain receipt), (c) mention Bitcoin OP_RETURN as the public witness, (d) pitch the Founder's Mark tier ($9,999/yr) as the right fit, with one sentence on FIPS-140-3 key management and FedRAMP-aligned deployment, (e) offer one specific CTA: a 30-minute classified-or-unclassified session with the gov lead. Spec-sheet-grade tone. No marketing language, no 'synergy', no 'leverage', no 'next-generation'. Reference DFARS / ITAR / SBIR data-rights once. The email must end with this exact signature: 'The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets.' Return ONLY the email as plain text. Do not include the unsubscribe footer (it is added automatically).
